message:
🐛 Add skeleton loading state to remaining cards missing useCardLoadingState (#778)

Cards with data fetching now report loading state via useCardLoadingState:
- NetworkUtils, StockMarketTicker, Weather, RSSFeed
- GitHubActivity, GitHubCIMonitor

Static demo cards now report hasData:true via useReportCardDataState:
- KubecostOverview, OpenCostOverview, KyvernoPolicies, ServiceTopology

Also adds tasks for arcade, alerts, cost, data compliance, helm,
network, and services dashboards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -154,10 +154,75 @@
       "id": "ai-ml-cards-skeleton-loading",
       "subject": "Add skeleton loading and refresh animation to all AI/ML and AI Agent dashboard cards",
       "description": "All cards on the AI/ML Workloads, AI Agents, and GPU Reservations dashboards show empty/collapsed states until data loads. They should display skeleton placeholders and animate the refresh icon while fetching data.

Affected cards:

**AI/ML Dashboard (14 cards):**
- LLMdFlow (llmd_flow) - LLM-d request flow visualization
- KVCacheMonitor (kvcache_monitor) - KV cache metrics
- EPPRouting (epp_routing) - EPP routing visualization
- PDDisaggregation (pd_disaggregation) - Prefill/Decode visualization
- LLMdBenchmarks (llmd_benchmarks) - Performance benchmarks
- LLMdAIInsights (llmd_ai_insights) - AI insights and anomaly detection
- LLMdConfigurator (llmd_configurator) - LLM-d stack configuration
- LLMModels (llm_models) - LLM model serving instances
- LLMInference (llm_inference) - LLM inference servers
- LLMdStackMonitor (llmd_stack_monitor) - Overall stack health
- MLJobs (ml_jobs) - ML training jobs
- MLNotebooks (ml_notebooks) - Jupyter/ML notebooks
- GPUOverview (gpu_overview) - GPU count and allocation
- HardwareHealth

**AI Agents Dashboard (7 cards):**
- KagentiStatusCard (kagenti_status) - Agent fleet overview
- KagentiAgentFleet (kagenti_agent_fleet) - Agent list
- KagentiBuildPipeline (kagenti_build_pipeline) - Build pipeline
- KagentiToolRegistry (kagenti_tool_registry) - MCP tools
- KagentiAgentDiscovery (kagenti_agent_discovery) - Agent discovery
- KagentiSecurityPosture (kagenti_security_posture) - Security posture
- KagentiTopology (kagenti_topology) - Network topology

**GPU Reservations Dashboard (7 cards):**
- GPUOverview (gpu_overview) - GPU overview
- GPUStatus (gpu_status) - Per-cluster GPU status
- GPUInventory (gpu_inventory) - Per-node GPU inventory
- GPUUtilization (gpu_utilization) - GPU utilization donut chart
- GPUUsageTrend (gpu_usage_trend) - Historical GPU trends
- GPUWorkloads (gpu_workloads) - GPU-requesting workloads
- HardwareHealth

For each card:
1. Show skeleton placeholders (shimmer bars/circles) while data is loading
2. Animate the refresh icon (spin) during data fetch
3. Card should maintain its expanded size during loading (not collapse)
4. Follow the same pattern used by OPA Policies card (opa-policies-loading-state task)",

Added useReportCardDataState with hasData:true to LLMdConfigurator. Added hasData:true to 6 LLM-d visualization cards (LLMdFlow, EPPRouting, LLMdAIInsights, PDDisaggregation, KVCacheMonitor, LLMdBenchmarks)."
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "arcade-cards-skeleton-loading",
+      "subject": "Add skeleton loading and refresh animation to all Arcade dashboard cards",
+      "description": "All game cards on the Arcade dashboard show empty/collapsed states until the game loads. They should display skeleton placeholders and animate the refresh icon while loading.

Affected cards (22 games):
- Checkers, KubeChess, SudokuGame, ContainerTetris, NodeInvaders
- KubeMan, KubeKong, PodCrosser, PodPitfall, PodBrothers
- KubeGalaga, KubePong, KubeSnake, KubeKart, Game2048
- PodSweeper, Kubedle, MatchGame, Solitaire, FlappyPod
- KubeCraft, KubeDoom

For each card: add useReportCardDataState({ hasData: true }) since games are self-contained (no external data fetch). This tells CardWrapper the card is ready immediately.",

Affected cards:
- ActiveAlerts (active_alerts)
- AlertRules (alert_rules)
- FalcoAlerts (falco_alerts) - if missing hook
- WarningEvents (warning_events)
- EventSummary (event_summary)

For each card: verify if useCardLoadingState or useReportCardDataState is already present. If missing, add the appropriate hook based on whether the card fetches data (useCardLoadingState) or shows static/demo data (useReportCardDataState with hasData:true).",
